name: Supine Spinal Twist
description: Lie on your back with arms extended to the sides in a T shape. Bring both knees up to your chest, then let them fall to one side toward the floor. Keep both shoulders pinned to the ground and look toward the opposite hand. Hold and breathe deeply, feeling the stretch through your lower back and outer hip. Switch sides. Also known as Reclined Twist or Supta Matsyendrasana.
